guidance:
Hi everyone! We're starting our retrospective with a Happiness Histogram. This is a great way to see how everyone is feeling about the work or the project in general.

Here's how this works: You'll rate your happiness about the sprint on a scale of 1 (Very Unhappy) to 10 (Very Happy). Be honest - this is anonymous and helps us understand team health. You can also add an optional comment to explain your rating.

Over the next 15 minutes, we'll capture your mood, reveal the distribution, and discuss what we notice.

componentConfig: {"min": 1, "max": 10, "step": 1, "labels": ["Very Unhappy", "Very Happy"], "allowComment": true, "capabilities": {"allowInput": true, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": false, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": true, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 500}}
guidance: Rate your happiness about the sprint on a scale of 1 (Very Unhappy) to 10 (Very Happy). Add an optional comment to explain your rating if you'd like. Take your time - you have 3 minutes.

componentConfig: {"min": 1, "max": 10, "showComments": true}
guidance:
Great! Everyone has submitted their ratings. Now let's look at the histogram together. Remember: we're not judging anyone's feelings - we're simply observing the data.

Take a few moments to look at the results. What patterns do you notice? Are we clustered in one area or spread out? What does this tell us about how the sprint went? Share one insight or observation. You have 5 minutes to discuss.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Instructions", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: This emotional baseline helps us understand where we're starting from. Let's carry this awareness into the next phase where we'll gather specific data about what happened during the sprint.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Mad", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Sad", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Glad", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance:
Welcome to Mad Sad Glad - a format that helps us categorize our sprint experiences by emotional impact. Over the next 20 minutes, we'll capture how we felt, identify patterns, and validate our experiences before moving into problem-solving.

Here's how this works:
• MAD is for things that frustrated, angered, or annoyed you
• SAD is for things that disappointed, discouraged, or let you down
• GLAD is for things that made you happy, satisfied, or pleased

Emotions are data - all feelings are valid here. For each item, write WHAT HAPPENED and how it made you feel. Be specific. For example: 'Mad: Daily standup ran 45 minutes again' or 'Glad: We shipped the user dashboard ahead of schedule'. One event per submission. Aim for 5-10 items total across all three categories.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Mad", "placeholder": "What made you feel this way?"}, {"title": "Sad", "placeholder": "What made you feel this way?"}, {"title": "Glad", "placeholder": "What made you feel this way?"}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": true, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": false, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": true, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 200}}
guidance: Add sticky notes to the Mad, Sad, or Glad columns. Write specific events and experiences. You have 8 minutes to capture your items. Try to include items in multiple categories if they apply to your experience.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Mad", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Sad", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Glad", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance:
Great work! Now let's see what we've captured. I'm going to display all items simultaneously so we can start to see patterns and themes emerge. Remember: we're not solving anything yet - we're just observing and validating our experiences.

Let's take a moment to read through what's here. Notice what resonates with you. Notice what surprises you. All of these experiences happened - and all of these feelings are valid. Take a minute to absorb what the team has shared.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Mad", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Sad", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Glad", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": true, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": true, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 200}}
guidance: Now vote on which topics are most important to discuss. You have 5 minutes to vote and review.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Mad", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Sad", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Glad", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": true, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance:
I see we have several clusters forming. Let's look at what we notice. What are the biggest clusters? Which emotion has the most items? What patterns stand out to you? These emotions are real data about our team's experience.

Notice that we're not dismissing anything as 'not that bad' - if someone felt it, it matters. We're also not jumping to solutions yet. Right now, we're simply seeing and validating what happened and how it affected us. This awareness is the foundation for meaningful improvement.

We now have a clear picture of our emotional landscape this sprint. These patterns will guide us as we move into generating insights and deciding what to do. Let's carry this awareness forward.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Instructions", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: We'll now go through The Original Four - four classic retrospective questions that help us reflect on what's working, what we've learned, and where we can improve. Take your time with each question - depth is more valuable than speed.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "What did we do well?", "placeholder": "What did we do well that if we didn't discuss we might forget?"}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": true, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": true, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 500}}
guidance: Question 1: What did we do well? Think about what the team did well this sprint. What practices, behaviors, or decisions led to positive outcomes? What should we continue doing? You have 4 minutes to share.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "What did we do well?", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Let's discuss what we shared. What themes do you see? What strengths can we build on? What practices should we definitely keep doing? Take 3 minutes to discuss.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "What did we learn?", "placeholder": "What did we learn?"}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": true, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": true, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 500}}
guidance: Question 2: What did we learn? Think about new insights, discoveries, or realizations from this sprint. What do we know now that we didn't know before? You have 4 minutes to share.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "What did we learn?", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Great insights! What learning stands out? What can we apply going forward? How does this new knowledge change how we'll work? Take 3 minutes to discuss.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "What should we do differently?", "placeholder": "What should we do differently next time?"}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": true, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": true, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 500}}
guidance: Question 3: What should we do differently? Think about what didn't work well or could be improved. What would you change if you could do this sprint over? You have 4 minutes to share.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "What should we do differently?", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Now we're getting to the heart of improvement. What changes would have the biggest impact? What's realistic to try next sprint? Take 3 minutes to discuss priorities.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "What still puzzles us?", "placeholder": "What still puzzles us?"}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": true, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": true, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 500}}
guidance: Question 4: What still puzzles us? What questions remain unanswered? What are you confused or uncertain about? What needs more investigation? You have 4 minutes to share.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "What still puzzles us?", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: These puzzles are opportunities. Which ones need answers before next sprint? Which can we investigate together? What help do we need? Take 3 minutes to discuss.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Instructions", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Let's summarize the key points we've discussed and identify any patterns or themes. Looking across all four questions, what stands out? What are the common threads? What insights emerge when we see the whole picture? You have 6 minutes to synthesize our discussion.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Instructions", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance:
We'll now do a Circle of Questions - a creative way to build on each other's ideas and identify actions. Each person will answer a question and then post their own question for the next person. This creates a chain of thinking that often reveals unexpected insights.

Here's how it works: I'll post the first question. Someone answers it and then asks a new question for the next person. We continue this chain until everyone has participated. Focus on questions that help us decide what to do next - questions about priorities, experiments we could try, or obstacles we need to address.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Answer & Ask", "placeholder": "Answer the question above, then ask your own question for the next person"}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": true, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": true, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 300}}
guidance: Starting question: 'What's one thing we could change next sprint that would make the biggest positive difference?' Answer this question, then ask your own question for the next person. Build on what others have shared. You have 8 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Answer & Ask", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance:
Look for patterns and common themes in our questions and answers. What topics came up multiple times? Where is there consensus? What actions are emerging as clear next steps?

Now let's identify 1-3 specific action items to try next sprint. Make them SMART: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound. Who will own each action? How will we know if it worked? You have 5 minutes to define our commitments.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Happy", "placeholder": "How do you feel about this retrospective?"}, {"title": "Neutral", "placeholder": "How do you feel about this retrospective?"}, {"title": "Sad", "placeholder": "How do you feel about this retrospective?"}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": true, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": false, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": true, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 100}}
guidance:
To wrap up, let's do a quick feedback exercise to see how you felt about this retrospective session. Your feedback helps us improve the retrospective process itself - it's like a retro of the retro!

Rate how you felt about this retrospective by adding a note to one of the columns. What worked well? What could be better? You have 2 minutes.

guidance: Thank you all for participating! Let's use what we've learned today to keep improving as a team. See you next sprint!

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance:
Welcome to Start Stop Continue — a powerful retrospective format that identifies what the team should start doing, stop doing, and continue doing.

Over the next session we'll work through three simple but impactful questions: What should we START? What should we STOP? What should we CONTINUE? Let's begin!

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance:
Here is how this works:

1. BRAINSTORM: You will have 8 minutes to add sticky notes to each column. Write specific, actionable items.
2. CLUSTER: We will group similar ideas together to find patterns.
3. DISCUSS: We will talk through the most important themes.
4. VOTE: You will vote on the items that matter most to you.
5. ACTION ITEMS: We will turn the top items into SMART actions.

Be honest, be specific, and focus on things within the team's control.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": "What should we START doing?"}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": "What should we STOP doing?"}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": "What should we CONTINUE doing?"}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": true, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": true, "showContent": false, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": true, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 200}}
guidance: Add your sticky notes to each column. Think about practices, processes, and behaviours. Be specific — instead of 'improve communication', write 'daily 15-min sync with design team'. You have 8 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Let's see what everyone submitted. Take a moment to read through the items. Notice what resonates, what surprises you, and what appears across multiple people.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": "What should we START doing?"}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": "What should we STOP doing?"}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": "What should we CONTINUE doing?"}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": true, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": true, "showContent": false, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": true, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 200}}
guidance: Add more items if you thought of something new. Focus especially on the Stop column — what is slowing the team down or causing friction? You have 8 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Good — reviewing Stop items now. These are honest reflections on what is not working. All feedback is valid. No judgement here.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": "What should we START doing?"}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": "What should we STOP doing?"}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": "What should we CONTINUE doing?"}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": true, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": true, "showContent": false, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": true, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 200}}
guidance: Final round of input. Focus on the Continue column — what is working well that we must protect? These are your team strengths. You have 8 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: All items are now visible. Let's take a minute to see the full picture before we start clustering.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Now we will cluster similar items together to find the key themes. Clustering helps us see the signal in the noise. Look for items that are about the same topic and group them. Do not worry about perfection — focus on finding the 3 to 5 most important themes per column.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": true, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Cluster the START items. Drag similar sticky notes together to form groups. What themes are emerging? What new practices are people asking for most? You have 5 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": true, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Now cluster the STOP items. Which pain points cluster together? What patterns of dysfunction are showing up? You have 5 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": true, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Now cluster the CONTINUE items. What strengths are showing up across multiple people? These are the practices worth protecting and scaling. You have 5 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Name each cluster with a short label that captures the theme. For example: 'Better onboarding', 'Meeting overload', 'Code review process'. Good cluster names make the discussion much more focused. You have 3 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Review the clusters we have created. Does the grouping feel right? Are there any items in the wrong cluster? Any themes we missed? Quick check before we move to discussion. 3 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Time to discuss. We will go through each column in turn and talk about the themes we found. The goal is shared understanding — not solutions yet. Listen to understand, not to rebut. We will capture decisions in the action items phase.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Discussing START items: What new practices, tools, or behaviours do people want to introduce? Why are they important? What would change if we adopted them? You have 5 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Discussing STOP items: What is causing the most friction or waste? What would happen if we simply stopped doing it? Are there items where the cost outweighs the benefit? You have 5 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Discussing CONTINUE items: What is working well that we must protect? What would we lose if we stopped doing these things? How can we double down on our strengths? You have 5 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Let's summarise the key discussion themes. What are the most important insights from all three columns? What patterns are emerging across Start, Stop, and Continue? 3 minutes to synthesise.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Cross-team patterns reflection: Are any of these themes recurring across multiple sprints? Are there systemic issues that go beyond this team? Understanding patterns over time helps us address root causes rather than symptoms. 3 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Now it is time to vote. You each have 5 votes to distribute across all items — you can put multiple votes on a single item if it matters a lot to you. Vote for the items you believe will have the biggest positive impact on the team. Remember: votes are about impact, not popularity.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": true, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": true, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Vote now — 5 votes each. Distribute them across the items that matter most to you. You can stack votes on a single item. You have 4 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": true, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Voting results are in. Look at where votes concentrated. The top voted items represent the team's collective judgment about what matters most. Are you surprised by any results? 2 minutes to absorb.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": true, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Let's discuss the top voted items. Why did these items get the most votes? What do they tell us about the team's priorities? Is there consensus on what to tackle first? 4 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": true, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Select 1 to 3 items to act on next sprint — one from Start, one from Stop, and one from Continue if possible. Limit is important: too many action items means none get done. Which items will have the biggest impact? 3 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": true, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Commit to the selected items. Say it out loud as a team: these are the changes we will make. Commitment is the difference between a retro that matters and one that is forgotten. 2 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Action items are how retrospectives create real change. We will now turn each selected item into a SMART action: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, and Time-bound. Vague intentions do not drive change — concrete commitments do.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "allowActionItems": true, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Define the SMART action for the top START item. What exactly will we do? How will we know it is working? Is it achievable this sprint? Why does it matter? 5 minutes to craft the action.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "allowActionItems": true, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Define the SMART action for the top STOP item. What exactly will we stop, reduce, or replace? What will we do instead? How will we hold ourselves accountable? 5 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "allowActionItems": true, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Define the SMART action for the top CONTINUE item. How do we formalise or protect this practice? Can we scale it? What would make it even better? 5 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "allowActionItems": true, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Assign WHO is responsible for each action. Not the whole team — one named person per action. That person does not have to do it alone, but they are accountable for making sure it happens. 3 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "allowActionItems": true, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Set WHEN each action will be completed. A specific date — not 'next sprint' but a real date. When will we check in on progress? When is it done? Deadlines create urgency. 3 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "allowActionItems": true, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Review all action items together. Read each one out loud. Does everyone understand what is expected? Is the action truly SMART? Are the owners clear? Make any final adjustments now. 2 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "allowActionItems": true, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Confirm commitments. Each action item owner says aloud: I commit to [action] by [date]. The team acknowledges. Spoken commitments are more powerful than written ones. 2 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Nearly done! We will close the retrospective with a quick feedback round and a moment of appreciation. Closing well matters — it anchors the good work and sends people away with energy rather than exhaustion.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": "What should we do differently in our retros?"}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": "What should we stop doing in retros?"}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": "What should we keep doing in retros?"}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": true, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": false, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": true, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 100}}
guidance: Meta-retro time! Apply Start Stop Continue to this retrospective session itself. What should we start doing in future retros? Stop doing? Continue doing? Be honest — your feedback improves the process for everyone. 2 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Here is the meta-retro feedback. Take a moment to read through it. This helps us improve the retrospective format itself. We will incorporate this learning into future sessions.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": "Share an appreciation for a teammate"}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": "Share an appreciation for a teammate"}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": "Share an appreciation for a teammate"}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": true, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": true, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 200}}
guidance: Appreciation round — share one specific thing you appreciated about a teammate this sprint. Be concrete: what did they do and why did it matter? Specific appreciations are far more meaningful than generic praise. You have 3 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": true, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Final summary: here is what we decided today. Review the action items one last time — the owners, the deadlines, the success criteria. Leave this room knowing exactly what changes next sprint. 2 minutes.

componentConfig: {"columns": [{"title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "placeholder": ""}, {"title": "Continue", "color": "#3B82F6", "placeholder": ""}], "capabilities": {"allowInput": false, "allowVoting": false, "allowMerging": false, "allowDelete": false, "showContent": true, "numberOfVotes": 5, "showTimer": false, "showVotes": false, "showAuthor": false, "maxLength": 0}}
guidance: Thank you for a great retrospective! Remember: the value of a retro is in the actions that follow. Go make things better. See you next sprint!
